release_note: Package 99C: Public flow simplified to Site Check -> Professional Review. Site Check entry now requires address + land size + frontage; user values labelled 'User entered - not independently verified'. Result is the truthful 7-part story (Map / What we found / What this means / Advantages / Disadvantages-missing / To add more value / one Professional Review button). State B reduced result when land size or frontage missing (Not confirmed / Professional verification needed). Low parcel confidence shows 'Parcel match not confirmed'. Executive Verdict, Institutional Scorecard, approval-confidence score and the report gate RETIRED from public flow (scoring functions retained as internal-only logic). New /professional-review.html (form + optional upload + 24-48 business-hours wording). No upload on Site Check. No public score numbers. Government-data engine, geocoding and parcel-outline fetch unchanged. [r3] Added professional-review-thanks.html (form success path). Verified real browser flow: State A shows entered land size/frontage with missing-message cleared. Removed residual scorecard header (OVERALL block + DA-median KPI) from result; stats row now Zone / Min lot / Land size (entered) / Frontage (entered). [r4] Removed sticky/fixed nav — header is now static on Site Check, Professional Review and thank-you pages, so it never covers content. Simplified the homepage sticky-compensation styles accordingly. No wording/flow change.
